text-zinc-600: What issue are you experiencing with a payment gateway?
font-medium (2): I need help setting up a payment gateway

whitespace-normal: Since this is a setup question rather than a bug, I can help guide you!
whitespace-normal (2): Hercules has a built-in payment solution called Hercules Commerce that's the recommended way to accept payments. It handles the full checkout experience, product catalog, subscriptions, and more — no third-party account needed beyond connecting your payments account.
whitespace-normal (3): Alternatively, you can integrate Stripe directly if you prefer.
whitespace-normal (4): Which would you like to set up?
text-zinc-600: Which payment gateway would you like to set up?

whitespace-normal: Great choice! To get started with Hercules Commerce, you first need to opt in. Here's how:
whitespace-normal (2): This step requires your input since it involves connecting payment credentials, which I can't do on your behalf.
whitespace-normal (3): Once you've completed that, feel free to switch back to Build mode and tell me what you'd like to sell (products, subscriptions, etc.) and I'll build it out!
py-1: Look for the Monetize tab in the left sidebar of the App Builder
py-1 (2): Click it and either connect an existing payments account or select your country to create a new one
py-1 (3): Once opted in, come back and switch to Build mode — I'll then implement the full commerce integration in your app
